commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3e5c13fa818049ef6edbee684b5b6e43cc1939df)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds compaction model alias lookup in `resolveEmbeddedCompactionTarget` and focused tests for same-provider, cross-provider, and unmatched aliases.

PR surface: Source +46, Tests +77. Total +123 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main returns a model-only compaction override literally, and the related issue provides a concrete log where that becomes `Unknown model: openai/gpt54mini`.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for the shared-resolver change and real runtime proof; ClawSweeper repair is not queued because the external PR still lacks contributor real behavior proof.

target.title: fix(agent): resolve compaction model alias to canonical model ref
target.body:
## Summary

- Auto-compaction dispatched a bare model alias (e.g. `gpt54mini`) as-is instead of resolving it to its canonical model reference, causing `Unknown model: openai/gpt54mini` errors
- Added `resolveCompactionModelAlias()` helper that looks up the configured model alias from `agents.defaults.models` and resolves it to the canonical `provider/model` reference
- When the alias resolves to a different provider, the auth profile is correctly dropped (same behavior as explicit `provider/model` overrides)
- When no alias matches, the override is used literally (backward-compatible fallback)

## Verification

- All 21 existing tests pass in `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compaction-runtime-context.test.ts`
- Added 3 new test cases:
  - alias on same provider (preserves auth profile)
  - alias on different provider (drops auth profile)
  - unmatched alias falls back to literal

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** Auto-compaction model alias resolution. A bare alias in `agents.defaults.compaction.model` (e.g. `gpt54mini`) is now resolved to its canonical model ref (e.g. `openai/gpt-5.4-mini`) before dispatch.

**Environment tested:** Node 24.x on Linux, Vitest test runner.

**Steps run after the patch:**

```bash
pnpm test -- --reporter=verbose src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compaction-runtime-context.test.ts
```

**Evidence after fix:**

```text
 ✓ |agents| src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compaction-runtime-context.test.ts > ... resolves compaction.model alias to canonical model ref on same provider (#90340)
 ✓ |agents| src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compaction-runtime-context.test.ts > ... resolves compaction.model alias to canonical model ref on different provider
 ✓ |agents| src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compaction-runtime-context.test.ts > ... falls back to literal model when alias does not match

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  21 passed (21)
```

**Observed result:** All 21 tests pass. The new alias resolution tests confirm:
- `gpt54mini` alias → resolves to `openai/gpt-5.4-mini` (same provider, auth preserved)
- `thinky` alias for `anthropic/claude-opus-4-6` → resolves correctly (different provider, auth dropped)
- `nonexistent-alias` → literal fallback (backward compatible)

**Not tested:** Live gateway auto-compaction with a real long-running session that triggers the embedded compaction path.

Ref #90340
target.author: huangting-xy
